_doc: User overrides at ~/.config/brainrouter/providers.json merge on top.
pickerVisible: when true, the entry appears in the /config provider picker and the wizard.
tierLadder: map of {flash,standard,pro} model IDs for the <<<NEEDS_HIGH>>> self-escalation.
Anthropic native was removed in 0.3.9 — route Claude via OpenAI-compatible gateways.

openai.label: OpenAI
openai.hint: cloud · api.openai.com · use "Other" for any compatible /v1 endpoint

lmstudio.label: LM Studio (local)
lmstudio.hint: local · http://localhost:1234 · blank API key OK

ollama.label: Ollama (local)
ollama.hint: local · http://localhost:11434 · blank API key OK

deepseek._note: Routed via the OpenAI-compatible flow (point endpoint at api.deepseek.com/v1). Tier ladder kept here so <<<NEEDS_HIGH>>> still works when DeepSeek is the active provider.
